headline: Philips Q1 Earnings and Revenues Decrease Year over Year, Shares Up
summary: PHG stock gains after Philips posts Q1 earnings, with 4% comparable sales growth and improved cash flow despite lower revenues.

raw.headline: Philips Q1 Earnings and Revenues Decrease Year over Year, Shares Up
raw.summary: PHG stock gains after Philips posts Q1 earnings, with 4% comparable sales growth and improved cash flow despite lower revenues.

headline: Apyx Medical (APYX) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
summary: Apyx (APYX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +54.55% and +6.23%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

raw.headline: Apyx Medical (APYX) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
raw.summary: Apyx (APYX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +54.55% and +6.23%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Elemental Analysis Market Research and Global Forecasts Report 2025-2026 & 2030: Adoption Driven by Rising Demand in Emerging Economies and Expanding Global Water Quality Monitoring Mandates
summary: The elemental analysis market is set to grow from USD 4.51 billion in 2025 to USD 6.48 billion by 2030, driven by regulatory pressures and industrial needs. The adoption of high-sensitivity technologies like ICP-OES is accelerating due to enhanced testing efficiency and accuracy. Key sectors like pharmaceuticals and biopharmaceuticals, facilitated by compliance regulations like ICH Q3D, dominate the market, alongside a burgeoning Asia-Pacific region. Major players, including Agilent Technologies
